uplink.description: Full uplink: battery, temperature, humidity, water normal (synthetic in-bounds)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds TLV. Wire values confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js: {battery:90, temperature:21, humidity:42, water:'normal'}; normalized here (battery%->batteryPercent, temp->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity, water 'normal'->water.leak=false).

uplink.description: Full uplink: negative temperature + water leak (synthetic, exercises signed LE decode)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds TLV. Wire values confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js: {battery:40, temperature:-21.8, humidity:65.5, water:'leak'}; normalized here (water 'leak'->water.leak=true).

uplink.description: Water leak status only - leak (TTN example input bytes)
uplink._note: Input bytes from upstream example. Wire value confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js: {water:'leak'}; normalized to water.leak=true.

uplink.description: Water leak status only - normal (TTN example input bytes)
uplink._note: Input bytes from upstream example. Wire value confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js: {water:'normal'}; normalized to water.leak=false.
Synthetic: channel 0xFF/0x01 is not a recognized Milesight TLV, so the codec reports an error.
